title: Dead Man Walking
subtitle: An infinite 2D runner game where users aim for survival time and healing society.

rooms.title: Links
rooms.summary: Live build, source code, case study, and project notes.
rooms.content: This floor stores the hosted game, GitHub repository, process notes, and supporting documentation for Dead Man Walking.

rooms.title: Challenges
rooms.summary: Survival pacing, movement feel, visual feedback, and replay pressure.
rooms.content: This floor explains the main design and build problems behind the runner loop, including difficulty tuning, collision feedback, health states, and the pressure of staying alive.

rooms.title: Gallery
rooms.summary: Sprites, gameplay screens, menus, and animation states.
rooms.content: This floor holds visual references for the runner, including character states, obstacle layouts, UI screens, and progress captures.

rooms.title: Overview
rooms.summary: A survival runner built around time, damage, healing, and replay.
rooms.content: Dead Man Walking is a playable 2D runner concept where users survive as long as possible while managing pressure, feedback, and recovery through the game loop.

title: Simply Green Website
subtitle: A paper ran business turned into a simple website meant for current customers to browse service options.

rooms.title: Links
rooms.summary: Live game, and feature documentation via github repository.
rooms.content: Visit my live demo to play the game and see how the raccoon evolves with your word-building skills. Check out the GitHub repository for source code, development notes, and documentation on the game's features and mechanics.

rooms.title: Systems
rooms.summary: Raccoon states, feeding rules, lives, progression, and browser storage.
rooms.content: This floor explains how the raccoon system works, including feeding limits, reward progress, graveyard states, and saved browser data.

rooms.title: Gallery
rooms.summary: Featuring preview screenshots of the project.
rooms.content: Checkout the gallery below.

rooms.title: Overview
rooms.summary: A word game where successful word puzzles feeds and evolves a raccoon companion.
rooms.content: Word Forage combines word building with a pet progression system. The player forms words, earns food, and grows a raccoon through repeated sessions.

title: Wilkerson Construction Website
subtitle: Construction owner requested a website creation to display their construction services, project portfolio, and contact information.

rooms.title: Links
rooms.summary: Live site, source files, and project documentation.
rooms.content: This floor connects to the Wilkerson Construction website and the source files behind the build. It gives the project a clear place for the hosted site, repository, and any supporting notes about the design and development process.

rooms.title: Structure
rooms.summary: Service sections, project portfolio, contact flow, and business presentation.
rooms.content: This floor explains how the website presents the construction company through service information, project examples, and direct contact options. The structure focuses on making the business feel clear, credible, and easy to understand.

rooms.title: Gallery
rooms.summary: Website screenshots, project cards, service layouts, and visual direction.
rooms.content: This floor stores screenshots and visual references from the Wilkerson Construction website. It can show the homepage, services, portfolio sections, contact area, and responsive layout states.

rooms.title: Overview
rooms.summary: A construction company website built to present services, work, and contact information.
rooms.content: Wilkerson Construction Website is a business website created for a construction company owner who needed a clear digital presence. The site presents available services, shows project work, and gives customers a direct way to understand the company and make contact.
